lastReleaseMessage: v0.10.0: bar-raise drain (D-006 loopback bind, D-007 import/rollback strict backup-fail, error_log + logEvent, daily prune, regex hoist, analytics surface modules, dedup guard, dashboard preservation, drift-fix F1-F8); .finances/ removed from git index (D-001/D-002 enforcement)

barRaise.topFinding: The code is healthy; the loop around it is broken. The 2026-05-29 canonical audit surfaced the root cause: seven of the eight skills CLAUDE.md names are not installed (only bar-raise is present), so the DESIGN-vs-code drift (F1-F10) is now two audits deep with no executor, and v0.10.0 shipped as a hand-authored commit (44b7b10) that bumped every numeral but never ran release.ps1, leaving CHANGELOG.md under Unreleased and DESIGN.md:3 calling the shipped release the next release. All seven locked decisions (D-001 through D-007) still hold in code and both daily tasks fire on schedule. Fix is install-or-strip the missing skills, then drain the doc backlog once.
